minter.description: Early access to free OP-20 mints

tracks.heroSubtitle: Monitor all your MotoSwap staking, farming, and liquidity positions across multiple wallets in real time.
tracks.noPositions: No DeFi positions detected for this address
tracks.noPositionsHint: Make sure the address has interacted with MotoSwap contracts
tracks.noAddressesDesc: Add your Bitcoin taproot or OPNet addresses in Settings to start tracking your DeFi positions.

minter.heroSubtitle: Connect your OP_WALLET and mint OP-20 tokens directly on Bitcoin's L1 smart contract platform.

school.heroSubtitle: From Bitcoin's fundamental rules to quantum cryptography. 7 modules, real exercises, zero fluff.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.subtitle: All key terms from the OPNet & Bitcoin DeFi course, defined in plain English.

about.heroSubtitle: Slowphie is a Bitcoin DeFi companion app built on OP_NET — the only smart contract platform that runs natively on Bitcoin L1 without bridges or sidechains. Three modules, one mission: track, mint, and learn.
about.startHereBody: Bitcoin DeFi is genuinely complex. Before staking, farming, or minting, take a few days to go through the modules. The technology rewards those who understand it — and punishes those who don't.
about.footerText: Built on OPNet · Bitcoin Mainnet · No bridges · No custody

tracks.label: Tracks
tracks.description: Tracks gives you a real-time overview of all your MotoSwap DeFi positions across multiple Bitcoin wallets — without any login or custody.

multiWallet.title: Multi-wallet tracking
multiWallet.desc: Monitor staking, farming, and LP positions across all your addresses simultaneously.

livePrice.title: Live BTC price & block data
livePrice.desc: Powered by Slowphie Server — prices and block height update every 30 seconds via REST polling.

aggregation.title: Complete position aggregation
aggregation.desc: MOTO staking, BTC native farms, LP pairs, token wallet balances, MCHAD custom staking — every position type in one unified view.

mchad.title: MCHAD Custom LP Staking
mchad.desc: Full visibility into MotoCHAD protocol positions: MCHAD staking, MCHAD/MOTO LP staking with time-lock multipliers, weighted amounts, and unclaimed MCHAD rewards.

lpComposition.title: LP pool composition
lpComposition.desc: For every LP position, see the exact underlying token amounts (e.g. MOTO + PILL) using live on-chain reserves — decimals resolved dynamically per token.

tokenTotals.title: Token totals card
tokenTotals.desc: Aggregate token holdings across every tracked wallet for a complete portfolio snapshot.

refresh.title: Block-driven refresh
refresh.desc: Data refreshes when new Bitcoin blocks are detected. Navigate away and come back — no reload needed.

minter.label: Minter
minter.description: Minter helps you find and mint free OP-20 tokens directly on Bitcoin's L1 smart contract platform. Some tokens are hard to discover on MotoSwap — Minter surfaces them for you.

hiddenGem.title: Hidden gem detection
hiddenGem.desc: Some mintable tokens are not visible in MotoSwap's standard interface. Minter finds them.

oneClick.title: One-click mint
oneClick.desc: Connect your OP_WALLET browser extension and mint with a single click per token.

supplyBar.title: Supply progress bar
supplyBar.desc: See total supply vs circulating supply before minting — know how scarce a token is.

walletBalance.title: Wallet balance display
walletBalance.desc: Your current holding for each token shown in real time after connecting.

mintStatus.title: Mint status feedback
mintStatus.desc: Clear transaction states: idle → pending → confirmed, with error handling.

minter.feeNote: A small platform fee of 1,000 sats is included in each mint transaction to support Slowphie infrastructure.

school.label: School
school.tagline: Learn Bitcoin & OPNet — Before You DeFi
school.description: School is the essential first step before using Tracks or Minter. Bitcoin DeFi is technically complex — understanding the fundamentals protects your funds and sharpens your decisions.

modules.title: 7 progressive modules
modules.desc: From Bitcoin basics to quantum cryptography — each module unlocks after passing the previous quiz.

quiz.title: 35 quiz questions
quiz.desc: Real multiple-choice questions with explanations. Score 50%+ to unlock the next module.

glossary.title: 40+ glossary terms
glossary.desc: Searchable glossary of all Bitcoin DeFi terms, defined in plain English.

exercises.title: Practical exercises
exercises.desc: Each module includes hands-on exercises with auto-saving answer fields, stored locally.

progress.title: Progress saved locally
progress.desc: Quiz scores and exercise answers persist in your browser — continue across multiple sessions.

positions.notStakedAnyFarm: Not staked in any farm — switch tabs to see details

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your tracked addresses
settings.invalidAddress: Invalid address. Use BTC taproot (bc1p...) or OPNet (0x + 64 hex).
settings.storedLocally: Addresses are stored locally in your browser only

exercise.label: ✏️ Your Notes & Exercise Work
exercise.placeholder: Write your answers, thoughts, or notes here. Auto-saved to your browser.

market.noDataBtc: No market data available for BTC

router.heroSubtitle: Compare MotoSwap pools and find the optimal path for your swaps.
